description.s: Router field view for Hob expressions. Delegates to field-view-hob-structural on desktop (fine pointer, no touch) and field-view-hob-text on mobile (touch or coarse pointer). Uses viewport-rendering's env object, consistent with tabbed-workspace and mobile-viewport-view. The ?env=mobile URL override is honoured because viewport-rendering honours it.
Per-call overrides: options.forceText === true forces the text editor; options.forceText === false forces the structural editor; otherwise the env decides.
